message:
refactor: extend BTreeMap/BTreeSet migration to trace and lab/explorer subsystems

Continue the systematic HashMap/HashSet → BTreeMap/BTreeSet migration into the
trace analysis, distributed tracing, and lab exploration subsystems. This
completes the deterministic iteration refactor for reproducible concurrency
exploration and trace analysis.

Affected modules:
- lab/explorer: ScheduleExplorer, DporExplorer, TopologyExplorer, CoverageMetrics,
  certificate_divergences() all switched to BTreeMap/BTreeSet
- trace/causality: task grouping and spawn event maps in ordering checks
- trace/delta_debug: region tree builder, PruneCtx, and all pruning helpers
- trace/distributed/collector: TraceId→TraceRecord storage in SymbolTraceCollector
- trace/distributed/id: add PartialOrd/Ord derives to TraceId for BTreeMap key use
- trace/distributed/span: SymbolSpan::attributes switched to BTreeMap<String,String>
- trace/dpor: SleepSet::explored switched to BTreeSet<u64>
- trace/minimizer: ConcurrencyTree children and elements_by_region maps
- trace/scoring: add PartialOrd/Ord to ClassId, remove BuildHasher generic from
  score_persistence/score_boundary_matrix signatures, use BTreeSet<ClassId>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
